primary_source: Mayer, M. G. (1949). On Closed Shells in Nuclei. Physical Review, 75(12), 1969-1970. DOI: 10.1103/PhysRev.75.1969.
note: a=184 is coprime to 3 (184 mod 3=1). 91 routes, all Cosmos. 184 is the predicted next neutron magic number at the island of stability (not yet confirmed experimentally). Regardless of its physical status, it is coprime to 3 and thus pure Cosmos.
